name: Cricket's Spam Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely crushed stone wheat crackers
3/4 cup Medium Sharp Cheddar cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute mushrooms in 3 tablespoons butter until limp.
2. Stir in the crushed crackers, then turn into a well-greased 10-inch round quiche pan.
3. Press mushroom mixture evenly over the bottom of the dish and up the sides.
4. Melt remaining butter, add onions, and saute until softened.
5. Add shredded Spam to the pan.
6. Layer shredded cheeses and Spam in the dish.
7. In a blender, whirl together eggs, ricotta, milk, and cayenne pepper until smooth.
8. Pour the mixture into the crust and sprinkle with paprika.
9. Place sauteed red and green bell peppers on top of the quiche.
10. Bake in an oven preheated to 375°F for 40 to 45 minutes, garnished with cooked artichoke.
